items.title: Sora 2

capabilities.title: Sora AI Video Generation Capabilities
capabilities.description: Sora models support comprehensive AI video features with professional-grade editing tools.

items.title: Complex Scene Composition
items.description: Sora excels at generating videos with multiple characters, intricate motion patterns, and rich environmental detail in a single composition.

items.title: Storyboard Control
items.description: Sora 2 Pro Storyboard allows precise shot-by-shot control over duration, camera angle, perspective, and narrative content for each segment.

items.title: Professional Editing Tools
items.description: Built-in tools including Remix for style variation, Recut for re-editing, Loop for seamless looping, and Blend for smooth transitions.

items.title: Extended Duration
items.description: Sora 2 Pro supports video generation up to 20 seconds, enabling longer narrative sequences with consistent quality throughout.

items.title: Multi-Character Scenes
items.description: Generate videos featuring multiple interacting characters with distinct appearances, movements, and spatial relationships.

items.title: Flexible Resolution
items.description: Sora supports up to 720p for standard users and 1080p for Pro users with multiple aspect ratio options.

faq.title: Sora AI Video Generator FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Sora AI video generation models.

items.question: What is OpenAI Sora?
items.answer: Sora is OpenAI's AI video generation model, known for complex scene composition with multiple characters, rich motion patterns, and professional editing tools like Remix, Recut, and Loop.

items.question: What is Sora 2 Pro Storyboard?
items.answer: Sora 2 Pro Storyboard is the most advanced Sora model, offering shot-by-shot storyboard control where you specify duration, camera angle, perspective, and narrative content for each shot.

items.question: Can I use Sora without ChatGPT Pro?
items.answer: Yes! You can access Sora 2 API through our platform without needing a ChatGPT Pro subscription. Sign up for free credits to start generating.

items.question: What resolution does Sora support?
items.answer: Sora supports up to 720p for standard access and 1080p for Pro users with multiple aspect ratio options.

items.question: How long can Sora videos be?
items.answer: Sora 2 supports standard duration clips, while Sora 2 Pro can generate videos up to 20 seconds in length.
